# cellpose2

**Category:** `segmentation` · **Maturity:** `beta` · **Implementation:** `external` · **Version:** `0.1.0`

Cell/nucleus instance segmentation with Cellpose 2 pretrained models.

## When to use

- Image-based cell segmentation for imaging assays.
- Cell/nucleus instance segmentation with Cellpose 2 pretrained models.
- Requires external backend(s): `cellpose`.

## When not to use

- Skip if optional extras / containers are not installed (fail-closed).

**Wraps:** `cellpose 2.x CellposeModel`

**Modalities:** `image`

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `image_key` | `str` | `image` | Input key in SpatialTable.images. |
| `mask_key` | `str` | `cellpose_masks` | Output label-image key. |
| `model_type` | `str` | `cyto2` | Cellpose 2 pretrained model. |
| `gpu` | `bool` | `False` | Use CUDA/MPS when supported by Cellpose. |
| `diameter` | `float|None` | `None` | Expected object diameter. |
| `channels` | `list` | `[0, 0]` | [cytoplasm, nucleus] channel selection. |
| `channel_axis` | `int|None` | `None` | Image channel axis. |
| `z_axis` | `int|None` | `None` | Image z axis. |
| `do_3d` | `bool` | `False` | Run Cellpose 3D dynamics. |
| `normalize` | `bool` | `True` | Apply Cellpose intensity normalization. |
| `invert` | `bool` | `False` | Invert image intensities. |
| `flow_threshold` | `float` | `0.4` | Flow-error threshold. |
| `cellprob_threshold` | `float` | `0.0` | Cell probability threshold. |
| `min_size` | `int` | `15` | Minimum object size in pixels. |
| `batch_size` | `int` | `8` | Inference batch size. |
| `anisotropy` | `float|None` | `None` | Z-to-XY voxel-size ratio for 3D segmentation. |
| `stitch_threshold` | `float` | `0.0` | Threshold for stitching masks between 2D planes. |

## Assumptions

- SpatialTable.images[image_key] is a numeric 2D/3D image array.
- Channel and z-axis parameters match the image layout.
- Model weights are available locally or may be downloaded at runtime.
